title: Versus: The Life and Films of Ken Loach
original_title: Versus: The Life and Films of Ken Loach
overview: A surprisingly candid behind-the-scenes account of the career of Ken Loach, one of Britain’s most celebrated and controversial filmmakers, as he prepares to release his final major film I, Daniel Blake.
